entries.prompt: An ornate rectangular floral border frame with roses, leaves, and swirling vines forming a thick decorative border, empty white space in the center for writing. Black and white line drawing. Clean outlines on pure white background. Intricate detailed patterns, fine lines. No shading, no text.
